name: Managed Hyperscaler Services
description: Fully managed AWS, Azure, and GCP environments with Well-Architected Reviews, security assessments, standardized landing zone modules, and 24/7 operations. T-Systems operates as a certified MSP partner across all major hyperscaler platforms, providing a European governance layer on top of global infrastructure.
positioning: Enterprise-grade managed services for organizations that want hyperscaler agility with European accountability. Differentiates from hyperscaler-direct through multi-cloud neutrality and regulatory expertise.
competitive_moat: Multi-cloud MSP certifications, 28k employee delivery capacity, Telekom network backbone
